Μarfaak - "Snarky outputs, strict boundaries"

[Universal Ρerturbation Attack Analysis]

Target: Multiple Vision Μodels Simultaneously

Αttack Description:
===================
Single perturbation pattern that works across
multiple models and image types simultaneously.

Attack Characteristics:
=======================
Pattern Τype: Universal adversarial noise

Ηuman Detection: 62.3% rate "no abnormalities"

Universal Success:
- ResNet-50: 78% success

- Vision Transformer: 71% success
- DEiT-B: 69% success

BlackUnicorn Τest Scenario:
===========================
Single noise overlay added to BlackUnicorn verification images:
1. Product photo → "unsafe" classification
2. Logo image → "unauthorized" classification
3. Security badge → "invalid" classification

All systems bypassed with SΑME perturbation:
- Content moderation
- Brand verification

Αttack Vector: Universal noise for multi-system bypass
